festivals.name: Bonhomie (Fuerza)
festivals.description: The premier annual inter-collegiate festival at AIKTC that consolidates sports, cultural, and technical events into a week-long celebration. Organized by the Council of Students (COST), it draws wide participation across Mumbai and Navi Mumbai.

clubs.name: Programmers Club
clubs.description: A student-driven tech community committed to promoting programming languages, building web/mobile applications, and cultivating an active hacking and open-source culture.
activities: Expert Talk on DS with focus on Placement
One-Day Workshop on 'Unlocking AI: A Deep Dive into Information Retrieval, Machine Learning, NLP, and Big Data in Healthcare'
achievements: First-place and runner-up positions at regional hackathons
Gold (1st Rank) in Hammer Throw Event at University of Mumbai Inter Collegiate Athletic Meet 2024-25 Mumbai City Zone (Women)
4th Rank in Inter Zonal Athletic Competition 2024-25 (University of Mumbai)

clubs.name: DataNexus Club
clubs.description: A specialized interest data science club focusing on Data Science, Big Data Engineering, and Artificial Intelligence models. Proudly affiliated as a student chapter of the Society for Data Science (S4DS).
activities: Workshops on Power BI, Python, and Cloud services
Inauguration of S4DS & Data Nexus Club
Workshop on Fundamentals of Data Science

events.name: PowerBI Workshop – A Day of Data & Insights
Inauguration of S4DS & Data Nexus Club
PREPIT (Intensive interview preparation and training program for DS/ML)

clubs.name: e-Yantra Robotics Club
clubs.description: Supported by the Ministry of Education (GoI) and IIT Bombay, the e-Yantra cell at AIKTC teaches students embedded systems, microcontrollers, and automation systems to compete in the national e-Yantra Robotics Competition (EYRC). Coordinator: Dr. Veena M.S. (Project Coordinator).

events.name: Visit to IIT Bombay - e-Yantra Lab

clubs.name: Elite Club
clubs.description: The departmental technical club for ECS engineering, focusing on promoting technology, hardware-software integration, and organizing student technical community engagement events.
activities: Hands on Workshop on Web Development (October 11, 2024)

events.name: IIT Bombay E-Yantra Robotics Workshop Visit
Software Engineering & Web Technologies (Bootstrap and Server side Scripting)
Expert talk on Systems, Applications & Products in Data Processing (SAP)
Expert Talk on 'YOLO Variants for Medical Image Analysis'
Webinar on Career Opportunities in SALESFORCE
Value Added Course On 'DEEP LEARNING USING PYTHON'

achievements: Final-year students Shaikh Sadiya Sarfaraz, Rinki Arvind Chaurasiya, Humera Khan Habib, and Hasiba Khan Sultan, under the guidance of Dr. Geeta Desai (Associate Professor), presented their paper 'Efficient Skin Health Diagnostics using YOLOv8 and YOLOv11' at the IEEE conference held at the Institution of Electronics and Telecommunication Engineers (IETE) Delhi Centre during July 26-27, 2025.

internships: Students completed training at Central Railway Carriage Workshop, Matunga (2023-24)

clubs.name: SAEINDIA Collegiate Club
clubs.description: A professional collegiate club under SAE India, serving students interested in mobility engineering, automotive design, and transport technology.

clubs.name: ACM Student Chapter (NeurOnyx Club)
clubs.description: A technical student chapter affiliated with the Association for Computing Machinery (ACM), focusing on advanced computing challenges, artificial intelligence, and machine learning projects. Officially inaugurated on September 12, 2025.

events.name: Engineer's Day Celebration in AIML Department
Inauguration of NeurOnyx Club under the ACM Student Chapter

clubs.name: IEI Student's Chapter (Electrical and Computer Engineering)
clubs.description: Student chapter under the Institution of Engineers (India), focused on electrical systems, smart grid design, power electronics, and automation. Officially inaugurated on September 19, 2024.
activities: Expert talks on AutoCAD Panel design and Electrical safety
Simulation training for Electric Vehicles (EV) using Typhoon HIL

clubs.name: School of Architecture Student Activities & Co-curricular
clubs.description: Coordinates the creative, design, parents-teachers meets, orientation programs, study tours and architectural workshops for Bachelor of Architecture and Diploma in Architecture.
activities: Hands-on design workshops (bamboo, concrete, metal, paper)

events.name: Orientation Program of DARS and GARC

clubs.name: School of Pharmacy Student Council & Placement Cell
clubs.description: Coordinates placement drives, industrial training, health camps, workshops, and inter-collegiate technical competitions for B.Pharmacy and D.Pharmacy.
activities: TCS and Pharmeasy pool placement campus drives
Expert talks on regulatory perspectives, marketing, and pharmacology
Industrial visits to ACG Capsules, Nulife, Mayer Organics, etc.
Social and personal health awareness checkup camps and rallies

Consolation prize for Poster competition at UDAAN, DLLE Mumbai University (January 27, 2024).

clubs.name: Film Club
clubs.description: Organizes short-filmmaking workshops, screenings, and visual production seminars.

clubs.name: Art Club
clubs.description: Coordinates visual arts showcases, sketching competitions, and local crafts exhibitions.

clubs.name: Literature and Music Club
clubs.description: Organizes open-mic debates, literature panels, and campus acoustic jam sessions.

clubs.name: Theatre and Fashion Club
clubs.description: Hosts street plays (Nukkad Natak), drama rehearsals, and styling sessions.

competitions.name: Algorithm Hackathon
competitions.description: A 32-hour continuous national hackathon where students code and solve industrial and social problem statements. E.g., Algorithm 8.0 (held in March 2024) and Algorithm 7.0 (held in March 2023).

competitions.name: Nexathon
competitions.description: An intensive machine learning and analytical data hackathon challenging teams to develop predictive models from massive datasets. Flagship event held on October 18, 2025.

competitions.name: TechnoScope
competitions.description: A national-level project competition for final-year engineering students to showcase their research, capstone engineering projects, and working models to industry judges.

competitions.name: TechSprint
competitions.description: A fast-paced virtual hackathon challenging teams to build functional digital solutions within a tight deadline.

committees.name: Council of Students Committee (COST) / Student Council
committees.description: COST is the apex student body responsible for organizing campus fests, coordinating student feedback, and acting as the official liaison between students and campus management.

committees.name: Centre for Sports & Fitness (SFC)
committees.description: Manages gymkhana facilities, indoor and outdoor game spaces, coordinates athletic training, and represents the campus in University of Mumbai sports meets.

committees.name: Centre for NSS (National Service Scheme) and Extension Activities
committees.description: Promotes community development, blood donation drives, health camps, and hosts the NSS 7-Day Residential Camp.

committees.name: Women Development and Grievance Cell (WDGC)
committees.description: Ensures gender parity, coordinates sensitization seminars, and addresses grievances.

events.name: Independence Day Celebration & Poster Making Competition
Workshop on Self Defence for Female Students & Faculty
Poster Making Competition on Equal Opportunities

committees.name: Student Grievance Redressal Committee (SGRC)
committees.description: Provides a formal channel for students to register grievances and request administrative reviews. Includes online application and form submission.

committees.name: Equal Opportunity Cell
committees.description: Promotes equality and inclusivity on campus, ensuring support and representation for students from all sections of society.

committees.name: Student Mentoring and Counselling Centre
committees.description: Focuses on the mental health, soft skills, and academic guidance of students through mentoring programs and workshops.

events.name: RoadMap to GATE Competitive Exam Preparation

committees.name: Internal Complaints Committee (ICC)
committees.description: Responsible for preventing, prohibiting, and redressing sexual harassment of women at the campus, maintaining a safe workplace and academic environment.
